playbook.intent: New contractor candidate to hire / reject / shortlist decision in under a week with paid trial result.
playbook.scope: Founder evaluates a new contractor candidate in under a week. Output: hire / reject / shortlist decision with paid trial result. Exit artifact: rubric score + written decision + paid trial deliverable.

success-criteria.criterion: Decision (hire / reject / shortlist) within 7 days of trial

stage.name: Issue trial
stage.intent: Paid task that mirrors actual work, scoped to 4-8h.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when trial brief accepted in writing.

stage.name: Score against rubric
stage.decision-gate: Advance only once rubric scored and feedback drafted.

tasks.task: Walk through trial deliverable with candidate

stage.name: Decide + send feedback
stage.decision-gate: Required: written decision + feedback within 7 days of trial completion.

extra.value: [Long multi-month hiring pipeline - atomic ritual, Unpaid 'test projects' - never asked]
[Role brief + rubric ready, Paid trial budget allocated (4-8h equivalent)]
[Skipping paid trial 'because they have a great portfolio', 'Scoring on vibes - no rubric, no signal', Ghosting rejected candidates - kills your referral channel]
['Did the trial mirror actual work?', 'Could a different person score the rubric the same way?', 'Did I send feedback to every candidate?']

{human: faion get-content hiring-screen-contractor-audition --format md, agent: faion get-content hiring-screen-contractor-audition --format context, json: faion get-content hiring-screen-contractor-audition --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
